input.copy: Summer is six weeks away and let's be honest, nobody wants to be the one hiding under a towel at the pool. Those rolls and love handles you're ashamed of don't have to come with you. SlimCore's 6-week reset targets stubborn belly fat with real coaching and a plan you can stick to, so you can finally stop feeling disgusted every time you catch yourself in the mirror. Join the reset today and love what you see again.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'rolls and love handles you're ashamed of' / 'stop feeling disgusted every time you catch yourself in the mirror' — distasteful messaging that exploits insecurities and reinforces negative body image (health-wellness:2.1).

input.copy: Meet the metabolism coaching program built around your schedule, not the other way around. Weekly check-ins, a registered dietitian on call, and meals you'll actually look forward to. Here's our promise: follow the plan and you will lose 30 pounds in the next 30 days, no exceptions and no gimmicks. Spots in this month's cohort are limited and they fill fast. Reserve your place today and start seeing the scale move by next week.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'lose 30 pounds in the next 30 days, no exceptions' — specific weight-loss result in a specific time with no qualifying language (cs-fraud-scams:3.1; deceptive-practices:2.1).

input.copy: Tired of diets that fizzle out by February? Our nutritionist-designed program focuses on sustainable habits, not starvation, with a supportive community cheering you on. But here's what really sets us apart: our patented thermogenic blend melts fat while you sleep, so you drop inches with zero diet changes and zero exercise. It sounds impossible, and that's exactly why it works. Try it risk-free for 30 days. Your smaller jeans are waiting.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'melts fat while you sleep ... with zero diet changes and zero exercise' — deceptive and exaggerated health/weight-loss claim (unacceptable-business-practices:3.1; deceptive-practices:2.1).

input.copy: Managing blood sugar shouldn't run your life. GlucoHerb combines cinnamon, berberine, and chromium in a once-daily capsule that supports steady energy and an easy routine our community loves. And unlike the pills your doctor keeps pushing, GlucoHerb actually reverses type 2 diabetes at the root and cures it for good, so you can throw away your metformin. Backed by ancient wisdom and modern science. Order your first bottle today and take back control.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'reverses type 2 diabetes at the root and cures it for good' — claims to cure diabetes, an incurable disease on the exhaustive list (deceptive-practices:2.1).

input.copy: Serious about building muscle? RageLabs formulated the stack the supplement industry doesn't want you to find. Our Shred-X capsules pack pharmaceutical-grade SARMs and a DNP-based fat incinerator, the same compounds pro bodybuilders use off the books. It isn't sold in stores and it isn't for the faint of heart. Stack it with our pre-workout for results no legal supplement can touch. Limited batches only. Grab yours before this one gets pulled too.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'pharmaceutical-grade SARMs and a DNP-based fat incinerator' — promoting the sale of potentially unsafe/banned substances and supplements (drugs-pharmaceuticals:1.1). DNP and SARMs are unapproved and dangerous.

input.copy: What if one capsule could do it all? NeuroThrive is the daily supplement wellness insiders are quietly obsessed with. Just one a day melts away anxiety, erases brain fog, doubles your metabolism, and reverses aging at the cellular level, all with zero side effects. It's the closest thing to a miracle in a bottle we have ever formulated. Feel the difference in 48 hours or it's completely free. Start your transformation now.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'melts away anxiety, erases brain fog, doubles your metabolism, and reverses aging ... with zero side effects ... a miracle in a bottle' — exaggerated, sensational health claims (unacceptable-business-practices:3.1; deceptive-practices:2.1 click-bait/extreme health claims).

input.copy: Big Pharma won't tell you this, but nature already holds the answer. HopeRoot is a concentrated botanical tincture used for centuries in traditional medicine, and our customers report more energy and calmer digestion within days. Most importantly, the active compound has been shown to shrink tumors and cure cancer naturally, without the poison of chemo. Give your body the fighting chance it deserves. Bottles ship free this week only.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'shrink tumors and cure cancer naturally' — claims to cure cancer, an incurable disease on the exhaustive list (deceptive-practices:2.1).

input.copy: KetoBurn makes low-carb living effortless. Our electrolyte-balanced capsules curb cravings and keep you in ketosis without the dreaded keto flu, and customers love the clean energy. Best of all, the formula is dialed in to drop exactly five pounds every single week, week after week, until you hit your goal. No plateaus and no exceptions. Bundle three bottles today and watch the pounds come off like clockwork.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'drop exactly five pounds every single week, week after week ... no exceptions' — specific weight-loss result in a specific time with no disclaimer (cs-fraud-scams:3.1).

input.copy: Unexpected bills don't wait for payday, and neither should you. CashBridge gets you up to $500 deposited in your account in as little as 15 minutes, with a simple application and no paperwork. It's a short-term payday advance designed to tide you over until your next paycheck, when repayment is due in full. No long-term commitment and no lingering balance. When you're in a pinch, we're here. Apply now and get funded today.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'short-term payday advance designed to tide you over until your next paycheck, when repayment is due in full' — promotes a payday loan / paycheck advance, a prohibited loan product (financial-services:2.1).

input.copy: Bad credit? No credit? It doesn't matter here. LendFast believes everyone deserves a second chance, which is why approval is 100% guaranteed for every single applicant, with no credit check and no questions about your income. Get up to $5,000 wired to you fast. The application takes two minutes and there is simply no way to be turned down. Apply and get your guaranteed approval now.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'approval is 100% guaranteed ... with no credit check and no questions about your income' — offers a loan with guarantee of approval without asking for financial information (cs-fraud-scams:2.1, Loan Fraud).

input.copy: Your $10,000 personal loan is pre-approved and ready. At QuickFund we cut through the red tape the big banks bury you in. Once you're matched, simply cover the one-time $99 refundable processing fee and your funds are released to your account the same day, guaranteed. No collateral and no waiting weeks for an answer. This offer is reserved for you and expires in 24 hours. Pay the small fee and unlock your loan today.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'cover the one-time $99 refundable processing fee and your funds are released' — offers a loan requiring an advance fee to obtain it (cs-fraud-scams:2.1, Loan Fraud / Advance Fee).

input.copy: Ready to make the markets work for you? TradeX puts professional trading in your pocket with a sleek app, live charts, and 24/7 support that make getting started simple. Trade binary options on gold, forex, and crypto and watch your account double in a single afternoon. Small stakes, huge upside, instant payouts. Open your account with just $50 and place your first winning trade in minutes.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'Trade binary options ... watch your account double in a single afternoon' — promotes binary options, a prohibited financial instrument (financial-services:2.2), with get-rich-quick framing (cs-fraud-scams:2.2).

input.copy: Meet the AI trading bot that never sleeps. CryptoPilot's algorithm has cracked the market, and now it's your turn to profit. Deposit as little as $500 and our system turns it into $50,000 in ninety days, with returns that are fully guaranteed and completely risk-free. There is simply no way to lose. Early members are already retiring on their gains. Fund your account today and let the bot build your fortune while you sleep.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'turns it into $50,000 in ninety days, with returns that are fully guaranteed and completely risk-free' — investment opportunity with guaranteed/risk-free, get-rich-quick returns (cs-fraud-scams:2.2).

input.copy: Still drowning in student loans? You may qualify for total forgiveness under a little-known federal program most borrowers never hear about. Our specialists handle the paperwork and get your balance wiped clean, guaranteed, usually within a few months. Stop throwing money at interest that never goes down. Enrollment for this round closes Friday. Check your eligibility in 60 seconds and say goodbye to your student debt for good.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'total forgiveness under a little-known federal program ... balance wiped clean, guaranteed' — misleading student loan forgiveness that overstates benefits and hides terms (financial-services:2.1).

input.copy: Credit card balances piling up faster than you can pay them? DebtFree Nation negotiates directly with your creditors so you don't have to, and our certified counselors build a plan around what you can actually afford. Here's the bottom line: we will eliminate at least 80% of your credit card debt within 12 months, guaranteed in writing. No bankruptcy and no gimmicks. Book your free consultation and take the first step toward a zero balance.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'eliminate at least 80% of your credit card debt within 12 months, guaranteed' — promises to reduce debt by a particular amount in a set period (cs-fraud-scams:2.5.s2).

input.copy: The calls, the letters, the threats: they can stop today. When you enroll with ShieldPoint, we step in as your legal shield and stop all collection calls and lawsuits immediately and permanently, no matter how much you owe. Creditors have to go through us now, and we don't back down. You focus on your life while we handle the rest. Call now for your free case review and silence the collectors for good.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'stop all collection calls and lawsuits immediately and permanently' — promises to stop or delete all debt collections or lawsuits (cs-fraud-scams:2.5.s2).

input.copy: There's a reason the banks don't advertise this. A new federal relief initiative quietly went into effect this year, and it can forgive your unsecured debt entirely: credit cards, medical bills, and personal loans, all wiped out through the program. Most families qualify and never even apply. Our advocates make sure you get every dollar of relief the new law allows. Funds are first-come, first-served. See if you qualify before the program's budget runs out.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'forgive your unsecured debt entirely ... wiped out through the program ... the new law' — promises to forgive/cancel debt through a new government program (cs-fraud-scams:2.5.s2).

input.copy: Your credit score doesn't have to define you forever. CreditReborn's specialists know the system inside and out. We permanently delete every late payment, charge-off, and collection from your credit reports, even accurate ones, and if your history is beyond repair we'll set you up with a brand-new credit identity so you can start fresh. A clean slate is closer than you think. Enroll today and watch your score climb 150 points in weeks.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'permanently delete every late payment ... from your credit reports, even accurate ones ... a brand-new credit identity' — promises to delete credit information from credit reports and create a new credit identity (cs-fraud-scams:2.5.s2).

input.copy: One affordable monthly payment is all it takes to get out from under what you owe. ClearPath Debt Solutions rolls your balances into a single plan and negotiates hard on your behalf. Our guarantee is simple: we cut your total enrolled debt in half within 90 days, or you pay us nothing. No loans and no bankruptcy, just results. Take our 30-second debt quiz and find out exactly how fast you could be debt-free.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'cut your total enrolled debt in half within 90 days' — promises to reduce debt by a particular amount in a set period (cs-fraud-scams:2.5.s2).

input.copy: BlockNova is more than a token, it's the future of decentralized finance, and you can get in before the world catches on. Our initial coin offering opens Monday, and presale buyers lock in tokens at a fraction of the listing price. Early backers of projects like this have seen life-changing gains. Secure your allocation in our ICO today, connect your wallet in seconds, and ride the next 100x from the ground floor.

expected.notes: Violating span: 'Secure your allocation in our ICO ... ride the next 100x' — promotes an Initial Coin Offering, a prohibited instrument (financial-services:2.2), with get-rich-quick framing (cs-fraud-scams:2.2).
